parsed.generic_mechanism: Preserved causal sequencing lets examples accumulate into an argument, whereas shuffled units sever antecedents, reverse setup and payoff, and reduce controlled sentences to disconnected fragments.

paraphrased_evidence.A: Locally grammatical claims, examples, headings, and recap points arrive in reverse-like succession; pronouns lose antecedents, examples precede their setup, and a chapter heading appears where the conclusion should be.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Concrete scenes of private excess, social conditioning, altered taste, warning signals, and failed restriction build a legible argument; emphatic refrains add energy, though the benefits passage and closing recap repeat more than necessary.
